channel.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Dec 7th - Dec 13th, 2020
item.description:
Documentation

  • Log4brainsstars117 - Docs-as-code knowledge base to manage Architecture Decision Records (ADR) for your project and publish them automatically as a static website.

item.description:
Misc

  • HTTP Toolkit - an HTTP inspection & debugging desktop application

item.description:
Admins

  • hssstars258 - Never type the annoying ssh commands again.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019
item.description:
Editors

Extensions

  • VS Code Extension Marketplace - Official website for extensions
  • Python extension - Official Python extension
  • Sync settings - Excellent extension for settings and extension sync of your VS code setup

    • Editors

    Visual Studio Code

  • Dev Git Repostars115.6k - Github code repository for VS Code
  • Monaco Editor Git Repostars24.5k - Github code repository for underlying browser-based editor

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
Misc

  • Fenix Web Server - A multi-host local static web server with push-button sharing (desktop app).

Text

  • Completorstars1.2k - async autocomplete with support for omni and semantic completion.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jun 26th - Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Git

  • git-secretstars2.4k - A bash-tool to store your private data inside a git repository.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv May 8th - May 14th, 2017

Presentation

  • hacker-slidesstars317 - Reveal.js based presentation tool

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017

Orchestration

  • Nanoboxstars1.5k - A micro-PaaS (μPaaS) for creating consistent, isolated, development environments deployable anywhere https://nanobox.io.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Notifications

  • CatLight - status notifier for developers. Checks the status of continuous delivery builds and shows desktop notifications.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jan 16th - Jan 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Presentation

  • WebSlidesstars5.6k - Making HTML presentations easy

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Editors

Atom

  • atom-beautifystars1.5k - Beautify HTML (including Handlebars), CSS (including Sass and Less), JavaScript, and much more in Atom.
  • file-iconsstars1.1k - Adds file specific icons to atom for improved visual grepping.
  • highlight-selectedstars245 - Double click on a word to highlight it throughout the open file.
  • minimapstars632 - A graphical map (preview) of the full source code.
  • minimap-git-diffstars21 - A minimap binding for the Atom git-diff package.
  • minimap-highlight-selectedstars41 - A minimap binding for the highlight-selected package.
  • atom-project-managerstars521 - Get easy access to all your projects and manage them with project specific settings and options.
  • atom-tree-view-git-statusstars24 - Show the Git repository status in the Atom tree-view.
  • atom-pigmentsstars527 - An Atom package to display colors in project and files.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2016
item.description:
Orchestration

  • azkstars910 - a lightweight open source engine to orchestrate development environments

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2015
item.description:
Git

  • tig - an ncurses-based text-mode interface for git

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2015
item.description:
Shell

  • oh-my-fishstars7.3k - Framework for managing your fish shell configuration inspired by oh-my-zsh.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2015
item.description:
Git

  • git-semverstars317 - A git plugin to make Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 and Change Log management easier.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2015
item.description:
Dotfiles

  • Paul Miller'sstars1k - Colourful & robust OS X configuration files and utilities

    • Presentation

  • bespoke.jsstars4.6k - DIY Presentation Micro-Framework
  • impress.jsstars36.3k - presentation framework based on the power of CSS3 transforms and transitions

    • Shell

  • fish-shellstars16.8k - The user-friendly command line shell
  • oh-my-zshstars127.5k - A community driven framework for managing zsh configuration.
  • zsh quickstart kitstars382 - Quick intro for getting set up with zsh and zgen

    • Git

  • awesome-githubstars378 - Faraz Fallahi maintains a curated list of GitHub & Git resources.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2015
item.description:
Shell

  • shellcheckstars24.7k - Lint for shell. Will find deprecated and/or dangerous usage in shell scripts
  • awesome-zsh-pluginsstars9.4k - List of zsh plugins usable with zgenstars1.3k and other oh-my-zshstars127.5k compatible zsh frameworks
  • zgenstars1.3k - Faster framework for managing your zsh configuration, backward compatible with oh-my-zsh plugins

    • Dotfiles

  • dotfiles.github.io - Collected dotfile resources. Has sections with dotfile bootstraps and lists of frameworks for various shells and editors.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2015
item.description:
Shell

  • zsh - A shell designed for interactive use, although it is also a powerful scripting language.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2015
item.description:
Git

  • git-extrasstars14.8k - GIT utilities -- repo summary, repl, changelog population, author commit percentages and more
  • ghstars718 - Fast GitHub command line client (hub port to Go)
  • git-extra-commandsstars644 - collected git helper scripts
  • git-it-onstars85 - ZSH plugin, adds a gitit command that opens the current directory on github in your current branch
  • git-upstars2.6k - a better 'git pull'

    • Diagnostics

  • nmon

    • Editors

    Vim

  • The Ultimate Vim Distribution - spf13-vim is a distribution of vim plugins and resources for Vim, GVim and MacVim.

    • Editors

    Sublime Text 3

  • Git Gutterstars3.9k - display changed/added lines in the margin of the editor window.

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Editors

Sublime Text 3

  • Emmetstars5.3k

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jul 21st - Jul 27th, 2014
item.description:
Editors

Intellij

  • keymapstars9 - a hybrid Vim/ReSharper/Intellij keymap

    • Admins

  • MongoHub - Native OSx client for mongo

    • Benchmarking

  • redis-fainastars1.6k Instagram's Redis counter/timing stats based on the MONITOR command

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jul 14th - Jul 20th, 2014
item.description:
Presentation

  • reveal.jsstars56.2k - markdown based presentation on your browser
  • deck.jsstars5.4k - markdown based presentation on your browser

    • Dotfiles

  • Zach Holman'sstars6.2k - oh-my-zsh, osx, Zsh, vi, Ruby, Git, and more
  • Mathias Bynens'sstars26.4k - .files, including ~/.osx — sensible hacker defaults for OS X
  • Thoughtbot'sstars6.6k - A set of vim, zsh, git, and tmux configuration files

item.title: jondot/awesome-devenv Jul 7th - Jul 13th, 2014
item.description:
Benchmarking

  • boomstars4.8k
  • phantomasstars2.2k - website perf evaluation tool
  • Vegetastars17.3k
  • apachebench (ab)
  • httperf
  • siege
  • wrkstars29.1k

    • Git

  • scm_breezestars2.4k Streamline your git workflow
  • git-sweepstars2.1k - safely removes branches that have been merged into the master
  • hub - git CLI wrapper which makes working with GitHub easier

    • Editors

    Vim

  • snipmatestars1.9k - textual snippets compatiable with Textmate snippets.
  • Powerlinestars12.5k - improved status bar for your buffers.

    • Text

  • agstars21.9k - A C based code-searching tool similar to ack, but faster
  • pecostars6.3k - interactive filtering, like interactive Grep
  • ackstars1.5k - the Perl based better-than-grep tool.

    • Editors

    Sublime Text 3

  • AdvancedNewFilestars801 - File creation plugin.
  • jsFormatstars1.4k - Javascript formatting.
  • LiveReload - LiveReload plugin.
  • MarkdownEditingstars2.9k - Markdown syntax understanding and good color schemes.
  • Package Control - The Sublime Text package manager.
  • RubyTeststars733 - Plugin for running Ruby tests.
  • Side Bar Enhancmentsstars2.1k - Enhancements to Sublime Text sidebar. Files and folders.
  • Sublime Gitstars2.8k - Git Integration for Sublime.
  • Sublime Linterstars1.9k - Interactive code linting.
  • TrailingSpacesstars883 - Highlight trailing spaces and delete them in a flash.

    • Presentation

  • vimdeckstars1.4k - present inside your Vim
  • remarkstars11.3k - markdown based presentation on your browser

    • Admins

  • Robomongo - a cross platform Admin for MongoDB

    • Data

  • s3cmdstars3.6k - the S3 CLI tool for Amazon

    • Desktop

  • Alfred - OSX productivity app /OSX/
  • Keycastrstars448 - show your keys while presenting/casting /OSX/
  • hydrastars5.1k - script your desktop /OSX/

    • Terminal

  • autojumpstars12.6k - remembers your folders and jump to them based on partial recall (e.g. j proj will jump

    • Workflow

  • fswatchstars3.8k - a watch tool which will emit FS events and you can run commands on demand with. Note -

    • Diagnostics

  • glancesstars18.3k
